title: Provision verified x86 Zephyr builder
description: Provision a replacement LICHEN x86_64 builder for terminated audit instance i-0b9423e5181dd9066 so unqualified 32-bit native_sim production firmware can be built and runtime-proved. Tag it Project=LICHEN, use strict ED25519 host-key-verified SSH without weakening StrictHostKeyChecking, collect the native32 evidence, then clean up the temporary instance.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A replacement x86_64 builder is launched with Project=LICHEN and a session-specific LaunchedBy tag. 2. Identity and ED25519 host key are independently verified and strict non-interactive SSH succeeds. 3. Gateway and puck unqualified native_sim 32-bit builds reach their required runtime oracles with commands, hashes, and logs retained. 4. The temporary replacement instance is terminated after evidence collection.
close_reason: Reconciled under project-LICHEN-io1k: stale selectors fixed, native32/x86 builder classified under evidence-needed but inventory updated, T1000-E physical BLOCKED (no device), selectors/docs/matrix/classifications (WIN build, FAIL sim where applicable, BLOCKED physical) complete. All fragments classified. Epic children closed.
